title: Forsaken Yet Free

sections.label: Intro
lines: Oh, hear me now, O Silent Sky,
In whispers, I call, though answers die.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: They speak against me with venomous tongues,
A chorus of shadows, where darkness clung.
Unjustly they hate, though love was my creed,
They cast their stones; I’m left to bleed.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But in this valley where hope feels so faint,
I hold to Your promise, unbroken restraint.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Deliver me, O Grace unseen,
From the snares of the wicked, this weary scene.
Let mercy rain, like stars in the deep,
Though the world forsakes, Your love I’ll keep.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I’m broken and worn, my heart turns to ash,
But their hatred’s fire shall one day pass.
For truth will awaken, though clouds obscure,
In the arms of redemption, my soul feels sure.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: When curses are spoken, they’ll fade in the wind,
The chains they have forged cannot hold me within.
Your justice will rise, though it seems so delayed,
I walk in the shadow of debts You have paid.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Deliver me, O Grace unseen,
From the snares of the wicked, this weary scene.
Let mercy rain, like stars in the deep,
Though the world forsakes, Your love I’ll keep.

sections.label: Post-Chorus
lines: Oh, Your love, oh, Your love—
Unfailing, unbound.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Oh, hear me now, O Silent Sky,
Though answers fade, I’ll not deny.
Deliver me...

epigraph: and of them that speak evil against my soul
styleNote: Low Strings Hum Beneath · Subtle Percussion Builds · Ethereal Harmonies
